name: lsp-routeros-ts
description: Language Server Protocol (LSP) for MikroTik RouterOS
author: AmmØ

routeroslsp.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Controls the maximum number of problems produced by the server.

routeroslsp.baseUrl.description: Set the host and protocol to connect to RouterOS.  e.g.: 'https://192.168.88.1'

routeroslsp.username.description: Username to use when LSP connects to a real RouterOS device

routeroslsp.password.description: Password to use when LSP connects to a real RouterOS device

scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.vsix:package: npm run postinstall && rm -f *.vsix && vsce package
scripts.vsix:install: npm run vsix:remove; npm run vsix:package && code --install-extension lsp-routeros-ts-*.vsix
scripts.bun:exe: rm -rf *.bun-build && bun build --compile ./server/src/server.ts --outfile ./lsp-routeros-server && chmod +x ./lsp-routeros-server && mkdir -p ~/.bin && cp ./lsp-routeros-server ~/.bin
scripts.nvim:install: npm run bun:exe && mkdir -p ~/.config/nvim && cp nvim-routeros-lsp-init.lua ~/.config/nvim && grep -q "dofile(os.getenv('HOME') .. '/.config/nvim/nvim-routeros-lsp-init.lua')" ~/.config/nvim/init.lua || echo "dofile(os.getenv('HOME') .. '/.config/nvim/nvim-routeros-lsp-init.lua')" >> ~/.config/nvim/init.lua
